fn find_by_index(items: &[String], indices: &[usize]) -> Vec<&str> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for &idx in indices {
        if let Some(item) = items.iter().nth(idx) {
            results.push(item.as_str());
        }
    }
    results
}

fn pick_elements(data: &[u64], positions: &[usize]) -> Vec<u64> {
    positions.iter()
        .filter_map(|&i| data.iter().nth(i))
        .copied()
        .collect()
}
